photo-annual.title: Annual Day 2024
photo-annual.subtitle: December 2024
photo-annual.description: The Annual Day 2024 was a vibrant celebration of our students' talents. Featuring a mesmerizing blend of classical and contemporary dances, theatrical performances, and an award ceremony honoring academic excellence.

media.description: Love all, serve all.
Help ever, hurt never.
The end of education is character.

photo-science.title: Science Exhebition
photo-science.subtitle: October 2024
photo-science.description: Minds competing, ideas colliding, and futures beginning. The annual Science Olympiad brought together the brightest young minds to solve complex problems, build innovative models, and explore the frontiers of STEM.

media.description: Students collaborating on a challenging physics problem.
Robotics division testing their autonomous vehicles.

photo-cultural.title: Cultural Celebration
photo-cultural.subtitle: January 2025
photo-cultural.description: A multi-day extravaganza showcasing the diverse artistic talents of our student body, featuring fashion shows, music battles, and culinary exhibitions.

media.description: The fashion show highlighting traditional wear from around the globe.
The music battle that kept everyone on their feet.
Stunning classical performances under the stage lights.

photo-campus.title: Campus Built to Inspire
photo-campus.subtitle: Infrastructure
photo-campus.description: Take a visual tour of our state-of-the-art campus. Designed to foster creativity and collaboration, our facilities include fully equipped laboratories, expansive libraries, and lush green open spaces for recreation.

media.description: The main academic block during early morning hours.
Our extensive library offering thousands of resources.
Quiet corridors for focused study and reflection.
State-of-the-art science and research laboratories.
Comfortable and modern hostel accommodations.

photo-sports.title: Festivals
photo-sports.subtitle: February 2024
photo-sports.description: A testament to teamwork, endurance, and sportsmanship. The Annual Sports Meet featured track and field events, team sports, and a spectacular opening ceremony with a march past by all student houses.

media.description: The 100m dash final ending in a close finish.
Intense moments during the inter-house relay race.

photo-independence.title: Independence Day Fest
photo-independence.subtitle: August 2024
photo-independence.description: A profound display of patriotism and unity. Students participated in flag-hoisting ceremonies, cultural parades, and insightful speeches that celebrated the rich history and diverse culture of our nation.

media.description: Students gathered for the early morning flag hoisting.
Students gathered for the early morning flag hoisting.

photo-tech.title: Going Green
photo-tech.subtitle: May 2024
photo-tech.description: Exploring the frontiers of technology, robotics, and coding. Students showcased their autonomous robots, software applications, and innovative hardware hacks to industry experts.

media.description: Students presenting their AI-driven projects to the judges.

photo-hackathon.title: Extra Ciriculars
photo-hackathon.subtitle: September 2024
photo-hackathon.description: 48 hours of relentless coding, caffeine, and creativity. Students teamed up to build innovative software solutions addressing real-world challenges.

video-promo.title: ASCM Promo 2025-26
video-promo.subtitle: Annual Sports and Cultural Meet
video-promo.description: Immerse yourself in the dynamic environment of Academia. This cinematic short film captures the essence of student life, architectural beauty, and the vibrant community spirit that thrives within our walls.

video-grad.title: ASCM - 2024-25 Highlights
video-grad.subtitle: Graduation
video-grad.description: A look back at the emotional and joyous moments from the Class of 2023 Graduation Ceremony. Featuring speeches from the valedictorian, the tossing of the caps, and proud families.
